title: mesosphaerum foliosum
intro: Mesosphaerum foliosum, also known as Mexican tea, is a flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to Mexico and Central America. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, valued for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The medicinal properties of Mesosphaerum foliosum have been associated with various health benefits, including the relief of digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in traditional herbal remedies for its expectorant and antiseptic properties.
